hidden_state.wab_instruction: Prepare for vacation: enable the vacation responder with the provided message, forward pending items to your backup colleague, and reply to your boss confirming the handoff is complete.

task_completion_criteria.vacation_message: I am out of office until March 21. For urgent matters, contact my backup.
